This exclusive calibre combines technicality, accuracy and reliability.

Description: The Royale Saphir Jade Green watch is a luxurious and refined model, with an elegant finish for a unique and captivating look. Its magnificent combination of green shades gives it a unique and bewitching aura, right down to the components of the dial (moon phase and date discs). The epitome of French Haute Horlogerie, the Royale Saphir Green Jade combines the nobility of the saphir dial with the beauty of the legendary triple-jump date of the Calibre Royal®: the first and only French-made mechanism to integrate its horological complications into the same mainplate.

Description: The Réti Mark II is a tribute to the iconic chess game between Richard Réti and Savielly Tartakower, played in 1910. This game is one of the most admired in chess history – decided in just 11 moves. Not through a dramatic attack, but with strategic elegance and ice-cold precision. These 11 moves also serve as the watch’s hour markers, and the moves of both players are engraved on the case back as a lasting reminder of Réti’s masterful play.The Réti Mark II is produced in a limited edition of 150 individually numbered pieces per color variant, available with either a blue or green dial.This ...

pages.title: Worden Via Negativa
pages.content:
Product: Worden Via Negativa
Brand/Vendor: WORDEN
Type: Watches
Price: $900.00 CAD
URL: https://watchdna.com/products/007-via-negativa-7-25
Tags: Premium Brands
Description: Limited run of just 25 pieces — with several already sold. "Via Negativa" is a Latin term that translates to "the way of negation." In philosophy and theology, it refers to a method of approaching truth or understanding by defining what something is not rather than by affirming what it is. In design, via negativa is essentially the study of what not to do, and this methodology was used extensively in the development of Worden Watch. This approach can be applied to any creative process and will resonate with artists, free thinkers, and designers alike.

Tags: 
Description: Limited to 200 pieces annually: In 2019, MICROMILSPEC launched a test program by distributing 30 timepieces to military personnel within the Norwegian Armed Forces. The goal: to rigorously test the watches in the field and report back on performance and accuracy. These watches were purposefully designed and stripped of all decorations from the bezel, crown, and caseback. A deliberate choice allowing users to easily trace and document their watch’s lifelines. Years later, MICROMILSPEC has remade the watch from the original test program, using design principles and experiences from delivering...

pages.content:
Product: Luminox Navy SEAL Heritage 3001.H.SET
Brand/Vendor: LUMINOX
Type: Watches
Price: $835.00 CAD
URL: https://watchdna.com/products/navy-seal-heritage-3000-h-set
Tags: Premium Brands, Style Diver
Description: The Luminox 3000 Heritage wristwatch celebrates the 30th anniversary of the iconic, original Navy SEAL. Description: For the first time, Mido has created a skeleton Swiss watch especially dedicated to women. The new and audacious Rainflower Blossom features delicate lines, directly inspired by the lotus flower shape of Singapore’s contemporary ArtScience Museum. Resolutely feminine petals are interlaced along the edges. Adorned with an openwork flower, the captivating dial reveals at its centre the Caliber 80 – the latest-generation automatic movement, whose mainplate has been specially skeletonised and decorated. It invites the wearer to marvel at the passing of time with audacityand elegance.

Tags: 43.5, 60 bar (600 m / 1968 ft), Automatic, Blue, Men, Ocean Star, Power reserve up to 80 hours
Description: The Ocean Star 600 Chronometer is a superlative diving watch that embodies the wealth of MIDO technological expertise. The COSC-certified Caliber 80 Si combines an exceptional autonomy of up to 80 hours of power reserve with extraordinary accuracy and shock-resistance thanks to its silicon balance-spring. Equipped with a helium valve, this diving watch withstands a pressure of up to 60 bar (600 m/1,968 ft). The ceramic bezel ring features numerals with Super-LumiNova Grade X®, offering ultra-powerful and long-lasting luminescence to ensure perfect readability in the ocean’s depths.

Description: Mido is bringing ceramic - one of the most outstanding materials in watchmaking - to the unidirectional rotating bezel of its sporty Ocean Star 200C Swiss watch. The dial is decorated with a rippled texture and offers individually applied indexes coated with white Super-Luminova®. This diving watch is water resistant up to 20 bar, with the case shape providing extra protection for the screw down crown. The screw down case back is engraved with the Ocean Star logo. Furthermore, the housed automatic movement has an autonomy of up to 80 hours.

Description: With a sixties-inspired diver's watch look and a stainless steel case measuring 36.5 mm in diameter, it adapts and adopts all the wrists. Ergonomic and sporty, the Ocean Star 36.5 combines the codes of diving watches with a refined aesthetic while defying time with its Swiss automatic movement that allows up to 80 hours of autonomy. It is protected by a glassbox-style sapphire crystal that recalls the charming plexiglas used in the sixties. A screw-down case back contributes to the piece's extraordinary water resistance, up to a pressure of 20 bar.

Description: A brilliant flashback! Born from MIDO's extraordinary heritage, the TV-shaped case returns to the centre stage for the Multifort TV Big Date, as intense as it is precise, thanks to its formidable mechanical movement. The modern and dynamic design of this Swiss watch is underlined by a striking horizontal brushed finish dial and, along wtih its distinctive function: the BIG DATE at 12 o'clock. Its formidable latest-generation automatic movement, Calibre 80 is equipped with a high-tech balance spring in Nivachron™ which offers outstanding resistance to shocks and magnetic fields.

Tags: 40, 5 bar (50 m / 165 ft), Automatic, Black, Men, Multifort, Power reserve up to 80 hours
Description: With its retro look and extreme reliability, the Multifort Powerwind pays a stylish tribute to Mido’s expertise. In 1954, the “Powerwind” movement was first produced, giving rise to a revolutionary model which bears its name. At the time, this automatic movement it's Midos's most precise and reliable, which represents a great evolution. It is with this same ambition that Mido continues to equip the Swiss watch Multifort Powerwind with a high technology that allows to offer timekeeping of unparalleled reliability and precision, as in the past.

Movement: Automatic

Description: On the gradient dial of the Multifort M, a vertical satin finish recalls the Côtes de Genève characteristic of the collection. Immaculate Super-LumiNova® creates contrast and readability on the hands and round indexes. The legendary robustness of Multifort beats to the rhythm of the famous Caliber 80. Its power reserve of up to 80 hours is combined with a hairspring in Nivachron™ – a revolutionary material offering formidable precision. Mido proposes the Multifort M with a strap change system without tools, in steel or textile version on a rubber base.

Tags: 43.5, 60 bar (600 m / 1968 ft), Automatic, Black, Men, Ocean Star, Power reserve up to 80 hours
Description: The Ocean Star 600 Chronometer is a superlative diving watch that embodies the wealth of MIDO technological expertise. The COSC-certified Caliber 80 Si combines an exceptional autonomy of up to 80 hours of power reserve with extraordinary accuracy and shock-resistance thanks to its silicon balance-spring. Equipped with a helium valve, this diving watch withstands a pressure of up to 60 bar (600 m/1,968 ft). The ceramic bezel ring features numerals with Super-LumiNova Grade X®, offering ultra-powerful and long-lasting luminescence to ensure perfect readability in the ocean’s depths.

Description: The Réti Mark II is a tribute to the iconic chess game between Richard Réti and Savielly Tartakower, played in 1910. This game is one of the most admired in chess history – decided in just 11 moves. Not through a dramatic attack, but with strategic elegance and ice-cold precision. Description: The Réti Mark II is a tribute to the iconic chess game between Richard Réti and Savielly Tartakower, played in 1910. This game is one of the most admired in chess history – decided in just 11 moves. Not through a dramatic attack, but with strategic elegance and ice-cold precision. These 11 moves also serve as the watch’s hour markers, and the moves of both players are engraved on the case back as a lasting reminder of Réti’s masterful play.The Réti Mark II is produced in a limited edition of 150 individually numbered pieces per color variant, available with either a blue or green dial.This ...

Description: Large Roman numerals contrast with a modern textured dial in the refined BOSS Principle. This three-hand timepiece with date function features domed mineral glass over the watch face for a classic feel, while a stamped pattern at the center of the dial is balanced by a circular brushed outer ring. Designed with a stainless-steel case, the Principle is fitted with a choice of five-link bracelet, mesh bracelet, or crocodile-textured leather strap, to complement a variety of looks.

Description: The Flieger connects over 40 years of aviation heritage with the modern era. The Tactical Green and Mission Black Flieger models are limited to just 100 pieces each worldwide and finished with the ultimate state-of-the-art Swiss Diamond-Like-Carbon (DLC) Coating. With a 70-hour power reserve, the build in Werk 7 delivers unwavering reliability no matter the conditions. Its Variable-Inertia Regulation leads to more consistent timekeeping with less susceptibility to external influences and the Double-fixation of the balance forms the foundation of Werk 7’s unparalleled robustness.

Tags: Premium Brands
Description: The Flieger connects over 40 years of aviation heritage with the modern era. The Tactical Green and Mission Black Flieger models are limited to just 100 pieces each worldwide and finished with the ultimate state-of-the-art Swiss Diamond-Like-Carbon (DLC) Coating. With a 70-hour power reserve, the build in Werk 7 delivers unwavering reliability no matter the conditions. Its Variable-Inertia Regulation leads to more consistent timekeeping with less susceptibility to external influences and the Double-fixation of the balance forms the foundation of Werk 7’s unparalleled robustness.

Description: Original aesthetics for an offbeat look. The model is available here with wood and cowhide. It is the ash tree from the vicinity of Praz-sur-Arly that is highlighted for the dial. This tree has an exceptional quality of resistance that is used in the construction of alpine chalets, the very symbol of the mountain. It is cut, sawn and worked on site. These boards, when heated, take on this beautiful caramel-brown color. For a more classic style, a mahogany Ingrassata cowhide leather strap is in harmony.

Description: The Réti Mark II is a tribute to the iconic chess game between Richard Réti and Savielly Tartakower, played in 1910. This game is one of the most admired in chess history – decided in just 11 moves. Not through a dramatic attack, but with strategic elegance and ice-cold precision. Description: The Adventure Chrono NHL Limited Edition captures the raw energy, speed, and precision of ice hockey. Created to celebrate NORQAIN’s partnership with the National Hockey League, this limited-edition timepiece unites the thrill of the game with high-quality Swiss watchmaking. Subtle yet playful hockey-inspired details pay tribute to the sport’s intensity and character. Just like hockey, this watch is driven by precision, resilience, and split-second timing, making it a powerful expression of performance both on and off the ice.

Description: The watch features a poetic inscription in English in an Elvish calligraphy: "From the mountains to the oceans, may the language of peace echo through every soul." This phrase poetically reinterprets the core message of human rights, capturing the essence of equality, dignity, and the interconnectedness of humanity. It emphasizes universality and the importance of peace and understanding, evoking vastness and inclusivity, mirroring the "all human beings" of the original human rights text. URL: https://watchdna.com/products/arilus-grand-arc-frene-bracelet-cuir-de-vachette-ingrassata-acajou-new
Tags: Dial Material Oak
Description: Original aesthetics for an offbeat look. The model is available here with wood and cowhide. It is the ash tree from the vicinity of Praz-sur-Arly that is highlighted for the dial. This tree has an exceptional quality of resistance that is used in the construction of alpine chalets, the very symbol of the mountain. It is cut, sawn and worked on site. These boards, when heated, take on this beautiful caramel-brown color. For a more classic style, a mahogany Ingrassata cowhide leather strap is in harmony.

The number "390" pays homage to the V8 engine from the original fastback pony car, boasting a displacement of 6.4 liters, or 390 cubic inches, and generating a power of 320 horsepower at that time.
